pahiṇa.meaning: message-sending; errand (in the compound pahiṇagamanānuyoga, the practice of going on errands as a messenger)
breakdown: To send; pahiṇa is the sending, the errand.

pahoti.meaning: proceeds from, originates; is able, is competent
breakdown: To be; pahoti means to arise from, and also to be capable, suffice.

pahoti/pabhavati.meaning: (in verse) proceeds from, originates; is able, is competent, suffices
pahoti/pabhavati.gram: verb, 3rd person singular present (two equivalent forms, pa + √hū / pa + √bhū)
breakdown: Full form (pa + bhavati); both mean to originate from, to be able.

pahānasaññā.meaning: perception of abandoning; contemplation of the rejection (of the defilements)

pahāsi.gram: verb, 3rd person singular aorist of pajahati (pa + √hā)
breakdown: To abandon; pajahati means to give up, dispel.

pahātabbaṁ.meaning: to be eliminated; should be abandoned
pahātabbaṁ.gram: future passive participle of pajahati (pa + √hā), neuter/accusative singular
pahātabbaṁ.goenka: The word carries the imperative of the Second Noble Truth as the tradition presents it: the arising of suffering, craving, is dukkhasamudayaṁ ariyasaccaṁ pahātabbaṁ — a truth that has to be eliminated, not merely understood intellectually. Each Noble Truth has its task: to be fully understood, to be eliminated, to be realized, to be developed.

pahīnaṁ.gram: past participle of pajahati (pa + √hā), neuter/accusative singular
breakdown: To abandon; the past participle pahīna means eliminated, abandoned.

pahīnesaṁ.meaning: of these (now) destroyed; these having been eliminated
pahīnesaṁ.gram: sandhi: past participle + pronoun, genitive plural (pahīna + esaṁ)

pahīyamānā.meaning: being abandoned; being eliminated, being forsaken
pahīyamānā.gram: present participle, passive, of pahīyati (pa + √hā), plural or feminine form
breakdown: To be abandoned, vanish (passive of pajahati).

pahīyanti.meaning: they vanish; they are abandoned, they disappear
pahīyanti.gram: verb, 3rd person plural present, passive of pajahati (pa + √hā)
breakdown: To vanish, be eliminated (passive of pajahati).

pahīyissati.meaning: will vanish; will get abandoned, will pass away
pahīyissati.gram: verb, 3rd person singular future of pahīyati (passive of pajahati)
breakdown: To vanish, be eliminated (passive of pajahati, pa + √hā).

pahūtadhanadhaññe.meaning: having abundant wealth and grain; rich in money and corn
pahūtadhanadhaññe.gram: adjective, compound, locative singular or plural form

pahūtajātarūparajate.gram: adjective, compound, locative singular or plural form

pahūtavittūpakaraṇe.meaning: having ample prosperity and means of existence
pahūtavittūpakaraṇe.gram: adjective, compound, locative singular or plural form
breakdown: Means of existence, equipment, support. (The long ū at the junction arises by vowel coalescence.)
To mutter, prattle; pajappati means to crave, hanker after.

pajjhāyati.meaning: is consumed (as if in flames); figuratively, is overcome with grief or remorse, broods
pajjhāyati.gram: verb, 3rd person singular present (pa + √jhā), often with a derogatory nuance
breakdown: Prefix: forth, intensive. (The doubled jj arises by assimilation.)
To burn; also to brood, muse; pajjhāyati means to be aflame, to brood in remorse.
To be born; pajā is what is brought forth — offspring, the race of beings.

pajāya.meaning: of beings; for the offspring, among mankind
pajāya.gram: feminine noun, genitive/dative singular of pajā

pakataṁ.gram: past participle of pakaroti (pa + √kar), neuter/accusative singular
breakdown: To do, make; pakata means done, performed.

pakativajjato.meaning: blameable by nature; what is wrong in its natural state (as opposed to wrong by convention)

pakiṇṇakakathā, visuddhimagga..meaning: Pakiṇṇakakathā ("Miscellaneous Discussion"), a section of the Visuddhimagga
breakdown: "The Path of Purification", Buddhaghosa's commentarial compendium.

pakkamiṁsu.meaning: they departed; they left, they set out
pakkamiṁsu.gram: verb, 3rd person plural aorist of pakkamati (pa + √kam)
breakdown: Prefix: forth. (The doubled kk arises by assimilation.)
To step; pakkamati means to set out, depart.

pakkhahato.meaning: paralysed on one side; a cripple (literally "struck on one side")

pakkhassupavassuposathaṁ.meaning: the fortnightly observance kept at the approach of the rains
pakkhassupavassuposathaṁ.gram: sandhi compound: genitive + noun + noun (pakkhassa + upavassa + uposathaṁ)
breakdown: The approach of the rainy season (upa + vassa "rains").
The observance day, the day of religious vigil.

pakkhipeyya.meaning: would throw in; should place into
pakkhipeyya.gram: verb, 3rd person singular optative of pakkhipati (pa + √khip)
breakdown: Prefix: forth, in. (The doubled kk arises by assimilation.)
To throw; pakkhipati means to throw into, place in.

pakkho.meaning: side; part, fraction; associate, one taken "under somebody's wing"

pakkhālesi.gram: verb, 3rd person singular aorist of pakkhāleti (pa + √khal, causative)
breakdown: Prefix: forth. (The doubled kk arises by assimilation.)
To wash; pakkhāleti means to wash, cleanse.

pakāseti.gram: verb, 3rd person singular present, causative of pakāsati (pa + √kās)
breakdown: To shine; the causative pakāseti means to make clear, proclaim.

pakāsito.gram: past participle of pakāseti, masculine nominative singular

palāyatampi.meaning: even of one running away; also while fleeing
palāyatampi.gram: present participle of palāyati, genitive singular, + particle pi
breakdown: Participial genitive ending (with niggahīta assimilated before pi).

palāyatanti.gram: verb, 3rd person plural present of palāyati with quotation marker ti
breakdown: Third person plural ending followed by the quotation marker ti (the niggahīta becomes dental n before ti).

palāyīti.gram: verb, 3rd person singular aorist of palāyati with quotation marker ti
breakdown: Quotation marker ending direct speech (the preceding vowel lengthens before ti).

pamuttatālaphalassa.meaning: of a palm fruit released (from its stalk); of the freed palm-tree fruit

pamutyatthi.meaning: there is release; release exists (for one)
pamutyatthi.gram: sandhi fusion: feminine noun + verb (pamutti + atthi)
breakdown: There is (3rd person singular of √as). (The i + a fuse as -ya-.)

pamādavihārino.meaning: dwelling in negligence; one who lives heedlessly
pamādavihārino.gram: adjective, compound, genitive singular or nominative plural of pamādavihārī
pamādavihārino.goenka: Pamāda, negligence or heedlessness, is the opposite of the appamāda (diligence, heedfulness) that the Buddha urged in his final words. One who is pamādavihārī, dwelling in negligence, lets craving and aversion multiply unobserved; the meditator is exhorted instead to work diligently, with continuity of awareness.

pamādādhikaraṇaṁ.meaning: in consequence of negligence; because of heedlessness
breakdown: In consequence of, on account of. (The long ā at the junction arises by vowel coalescence.)

pannarase.meaning: on the fifteenth day (of the fortnight, the full-moon day)
pannarase.gram: masculine numeral noun, locative singular (pañca + dasa)

pantañca.meaning: and the remote; and a secluded (dwelling)
breakdown: And. (The niggahīta becomes ñ before c.)

panthaduhanampi.meaning: highway robbery too; waylaying and hurting travellers on the road
panthaduhanampi.gram: masculine noun, compound, accusative singular + particle pi

panupāsakāse.gram: particle + masculine noun, metrical locative/nominative plural (pana + upāsakāse)

breakdown: Prefix: forth. (The doubled pp arises by assimilation.)
To obtain, reach; pappoti means to attain.

parabyābādhāyapi.meaning: also to the affliction of others; even for the pain, evil or misery of others
parabyābādhāyapi.gram: masculine noun, compound, dative singular + particle pi

paradattūpajīvino.meaning: living on what is given by others
paradattūpajīvino.gram: adjective, compound, genitive singular or nominative plural of paradattūpajīvī
breakdown: Living on, subsisting by (upa + √jīv). (The long ū at the junction arises by vowel coalescence.)

paradāragamanañceva.meaning: and likewise going to the wives of others; adultery and suchlike
paradāragamanañceva.gram: sandhi compound: noun + conjunctions (paradāragamanaṁ + ca + eva)
breakdown: And + suchlike, likewise (fused as ceva; the niggahīta becomes ñ before c).

paradārampi.meaning: another's wife too; even the wife of another
paradārampi.gram: masculine noun, compound, accusative singular + particle pi
